   "reasoning": "As a union representative, I'm wary of interventions that could be used to undermine teacher autonomy or create unfair performance metrics. Bonuses tied to test scores, like the teacher incentive, are a slippery slope towards performance pay, and transparency reports can be used to scapegoat teachers. Instead, I'm pushing for a funding boost to stabilize our budget, hiring more staff to reduce class sizes, and investing in student scholarships and counseling programs to support our students' well-being.",
